name: canon
description: Canonical agent standards, verification gates, and repo contracts for durable software work.

interface.shortDescription: Canonical standards and proof gates for agentic software work.
interface.longDescription: Canon packages durable agent operating standards, repo contracts, and verification gates so Codex and other agents can work against the same definition of done.
defaultPrompt: Check this repo against Canon standards.
Add a verification gate for this workflow.
Review this agent change for proof gaps.
